name: aggregator orders files alphabetically within a namespace folder
setup:
cat > tree/google/c-file.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: c-source
  authoritative_publisher: c
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/c
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:c
rules:
  - id: c-rule
    name: c
    description: c rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/c.sh
recommended_set: [c-rule]
all_set: [c-rule]
EOF

cat > tree/google/a-file.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: a-source
  authoritative_publisher: a
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/a
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:a
rules:
  - id: a-rule
    name: a
    description: a rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/a.sh
recommended_set: [a-rule]
all_set: [a-rule]
EOF

cat > tree/google/b-file.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: b-source
  authoritative_publisher: b
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/b
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:b
rules:
  - id: b-rule
    name: b
    description: b rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/b.sh
recommended_set: [b-rule]
all_set: [b-rule]
EOF
